description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS Builds that runs on every push to master, github_actions, and 1.2 branches, and on pull requests to master. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build Godot for macOS on both x86_64 and arm64 architectures, with multiple targets and configurations. It checks out the Godot repository and a module, sets up Python and SCons, installs dependencies, builds the project, and uploads artifacts.
